title: Right to expropriate denied
doc_html:
§1906.  Right to expropriate denied

The Columbia Port Commission may not acquire by expropriation any wharves, landings or any other property now in use by private interests.

Added by Acts 1962, No. 239, §1.
doc_text:
§1906.  Right to expropriate denied
The Columbia Port Commission may not acquire by expropriation any wharves, landings or any other property now in use by private interests.
Added by Acts 1962, No. 239, §1.
